title: Project Lightwell brings open source security into the AI era
summary: IBM and Red Hat announced Project Lightwell, a $5 billion investment combining AI-augmented engineers with a trusted security clearinghouse to protect the open source ecosystem. The initiative addresses the growing cybersecurity risks in open source software that powers over 90% of Fortune 500 companies.
